title: vigna sinensis subsp. cylindrica
intro: Vigna sinensis subsp. cylindrica, also known as Yardlong bean or Asparagus bean, is a type of climbing legume native to Asia and Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The Yardlong bean has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Yardlong bean is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, soups, and stir-fries, and is also consumed as a fresh vegetable or used as a source of fiber and protein.
